name: Gina
description: Gina is an A-Rank mage and was one of the Raid Members in Son Ki-Hoon's Party in an A-Ranked Gate. She has long blonde hair and deep red eyes. Her height is average and she has a very attractive body. Gina has a serious personality this can be seen when she answers Son Ki-Hoon's question about if she was responsible for killing one of the High Orcs.

name: Hina Nemoto
description: Hina Nemoto is a classmate of Tomoko since her first year in high school. Hina first met Tomoko during their entrance exam; however, Tomoko quickly forgot about her. She is Tomoko's high school classmate who wants to become a voice actress. While appearing friendly and vivacious, she often tries to keep herself above others while inwardly accusing them, including Tomoko, over "looking down" on her. name: Huey Laforet
nativeName: ヒューイ・ラフォレット
description: One of Advena Avis immortals. Aside from Elmer, Huey sees everyone, including his own children, as possible test subjects for his experiments. Huey has many groups, of both humans and non-humans (his homunculi), working under him, like the Lemures and the Lamia. In the 1930s, Huey is arrested for terrorism and sent to Alcatraz. However, he still seems to be able to communicate with outside world, aggravating Victor to no end. ~!Huey's mother was killed during the witch hunts which left him angry

name: Ichiri Sanjou
description: Skateboard-loving Ichiri Sanjou, nicknamed "Icchi," may look like a normal energetic kid, but whenever she sees the full moon, she is hit with a wave of emotion she cannot comprehend. (Source: MangaUpdates)

name: Jeong-U Min
description: **Career:** Terrorist **Ability:** Predicts danger with his eyes that see misfortune **Hobby:** High jumps through buildings using magnetism A hero that poses as a terrorist to save people in danger, with his eyes that see misfortune.

name: Jodie Starling
nativeName: ジョディ・スターリング
description: Jodie is the English teacher of Ran and Sonoko. ~!She is also a Member of the FBI. With Conan and Shuuichi, she fights against the Black Organisation. Her Father, who was also a Member of the FBI, was murdered by Vermouth. Jodie was aged 6-9 during that incident.!~

name: Jun Asari-Marchs
description: **Height:** 174 cm Jun is a cool, blond, beautiful boy with an English father and Japanese mother. He is a side back who is good at attacking.

name: Kaisei Ebisugawa
description: Daughter of Ebisugawa and ~!Shimogamo Yasaburou's Fiancé.!~

name: Kamito Kazehaya
description: The main character of this story, who suddenly sees Claire while she's washing herself. He eventually becomes her slave spirit. ~!He is actually Ren Ashbell, the strongest blade dancer.!~

name: Kanade Sakurada
description: __Ability:__ Heaven's Gate Kanade is the third of the nine Sakurada children and the second oldest daughter. She is twins with her brother Shuu. She is also the vice president of the student council. Her ability makes her able to materialize any object. However, the cost of the object is immediately removed from her savings.

name: Kankichi Ryoutsu
description: "Ryo-san" is a thirty-six-year-old police officer with the personality of a twelve-year-old. His laziness when it comes to work is matched only by his zeal and cleverness in hatching money-making schemes, the fruits of which are invariably squandered on toys, gadgets, and cheap entertainment. name: Kenshiro Kasumi
description: The main character and 62nd successor to Hokuto Shinken. Known in Shanghai as "Yán Wáng" (閻王, En'ō). Loves smoking cigarettes, reading, and has a good smelling instinct. His fighting technique is similar to Toki, in which he fight in a fluid and smooth fighting style. In Japan, he's a lecturer at the Tōwa Women's University. name: Kimi Nishino
description: Kimi Nishino is a assistant for Akihiro Kanou who aids in his ghoulification experiments, the previous human lover of Nishiki Nishio and a medical student at Kamii University.~!Although she is aware of his ghoul nature, she remained loyal to him and kept his secret. After the Owl Suppression Operation, he left her in order to keep her safe.!~
